cards.home_miners.body: Mine to your own HOBC address using a simple worker name. Pool payouts go to the address before the dot.
cards.home_miners.title: Home solo mining
cards.nano.body: The HOBC Nano Pool starts at difficulty 0.005 for small SHA-256 miners, low-hashrate test miners, Bitaxe-style setups, and NerdMiner-style hobby devices.
cards.nano.title: Nano miner friendly
cards.transparent.body: The launch reserve is 10% of total supply and must be visible across the portal.
cards.transparent.title: Transparent reserve
dashboard.live_lead: Chain, pool, wallet, explorer, and supply metrics update automatically from local API endpoints.
hero.lead: HobbyHash Coin (HOBC) is a SHA-256 cryptocurrency focused on transparent home solo mining, nano miner friendly access, small miner setup, and solo pools only.
hero.title: Built for Small SHA-256 Miners
meta.description: HobbyHash Coin command center for nano miners, small SHA-256 miners, Bitaxe-style miners, solo pools, live stats, wallet safety, and HOBC docs.
meta.title: HOBC Nano Miner Command Center
